global_design_rules.concept: The design mixes the warmth and trust of clinical psychology (Organic & Earthy) with the discretion and high-end feel of a private boutique clinic (Jewel & Luxury).
global_design_rules.public_website_strategy: High-impact dark mode for the hero and trust-building sections (premium, discreet). Content-heavy sections (FAQ, blog, booking) transition to warm cream for readability.
global_design_rules.dashboard_strategy: Therapist and Admin portals use the light/warm cream theme to reduce eye strain, ensure data clarity, and maintain a calm professional environment.

headings.description: Clean, modern, geometric but friendly. Ideal for a premium trustworthy look without feeling overly clinical.

body.description: Legible, clean, and warm for body text. Provides excellent readability for dense dashboards and blog posts.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding (p-8, p-12, p-16) to create breathing room. Avoid cramped sections.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: Use asymmetrical bento grids for marketing feature showcases. Use tight, structured grids (Mode B) for the gestionale/admin dashboards.
layout_and_spacing.corners: Use rounded-2xl for main cards/containers, rounded-full for buttons and pills to soften the interface and convey warmth.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Rely on 1px subtle borders (border-border/40) instead of heavy drop shadows.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4A017] text-white hover:bg-[#B38612] rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border border-[#6B8FA3] text-[#6B8FA3] hover:bg-[#6B8FA3] hover:text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-black/5 dark:hover:bg-white/10 rounded-full px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.marketing: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 p-8 rounded-2xl
cards.dashboard: bg-white border border-black/5 p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm

navigation.public: Sticky header. Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 (dark mode) with a 1px border-b border-white/10.
navigation.dashboard: Solid background bg-[#FDFBF7] with border-b border-black/10.

hero_background.description: Dark abstract rippling texture used for the hero background, conveying depth, mystery, and premium discretion.

accessibility.contrast: Maintain 4.5:1 ratio minimum for standard text. When text is placed over images, apply a dark gradient overlay or text-shadow.
accessibility.interactive_elements: Include focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D4A017] for all form inputs and buttons to ensure keyboard accessibility.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query for all transitions.

instructions_to_main_agent: PRIORITY: Build the Gestionale (Admin Panel) FIRST, then move on to the Public Website.
All interface text MUST be in Italian.
Use Phosphor Icons (yarn add @phosphor-icons/react) for a premium, duotone appearance.
Fonts: Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Figtree' for body text. Make sure to import them in the global CSS or index.html.
Dashboard / Gestionale: Implement using the 'light_mode' colors (#FDFBF7 background) for a warm, clean, readable clinical management experience.
Public Website: Use the 'dark_mode' colors (#0A0A0A background) for the Hero and main landing sections to convey premium discretion. Transition to 'light_mode' for text-heavy content (FAQ, Blog).
Therapist Matching Questionnaire: Implement as a smooth, multi-step flow using Framer Motion.
Data Test IDs: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`).
DO NOT use placeholder images. Use only the provided URLs in the media_and_images section.
